jd_text: We are supporting a fast-growing, technology-first organization building next-generation digital products powered by AI, Cloud, and Data . We are looking for a Head of IT who can lead both corporate IT infrastructure and DevOps capabilities , while driving an AI-first technology mindset across the organization. This role requires a leader who can balance internal IT operations, cloud infrastructure, security, and scalable engineering practices in a high-growth environment. Key Responsibilities Corporate IT & Infrastructure Own and manage end-to-end corporate IT operations including internal systems, networks, devices, and security Oversee cloud hosting environments (AWS / GCP / Azure) ensuring scalability, reliability, and cost optimization Implement and maintain IT governance, compliance, and security best practices DevOps & Engineering Enablement Build and lead DevOps practices including CI/CD pipelines, automation, and infrastructure as code Ensure high availability, performance, and scalability of production systems Work closely with Engineering teams to enable efficient and reliable product delivery AI-First Technology Enablement Drive adoption of AI tools, automation, and intelligent workflows across engineering and business functions Support teams in integrating AI/ML capabilities into products and internal processes Stay ahead of emerging technologies and bring innovation into the tech stack Security & Compliance Ensure data security, privacy, and regulatory compliance across all systems Implement robust access controls, monitoring, and incident response frameworks Leadership & Strategy Define and execute the IT and infrastructure roadmap aligned with business growth Build and lead a high-performing IT & DevOps team Partner with leadership on technology strategy, scalability, and cost efficiency What We’re Looking For 10+ years of experience in IT Infrastructure, Cloud, and DevOps leadership roles Strong hands-on experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) Deep understanding of DevOps practices, CI/CD, automation, and infrastructure as code Exposure to AI/ML tools, platforms, or AI-driven workflows Strong knowledge of security, compliance, and IT governance frameworks Experience in high-growth startups or tech-driven environments is highly preferred Ability to operate in a fast-paced, high-ownership environment Why This Role? Opportunity to build and scale IT + DevOps from the ground up Work on cutting-edge AI-driven technology environments High ownership with direct exposure to leadership Fast-paced, execution-driven environment
